data.name: Kawaii Clicker Reborn
data.detailed_description:
【終極可愛♥點擊遊戲，以更萌姿態強勢回歸!!】

《Kawaii Clicker Reborn》是一款與可愛角色一同生產愛心的點擊遊戲。

點擊畫面累積能量條，在具備生產力加成效果的「狂熱模式」中大量獲取愛心！

用收集的愛心購買神秘道具，進一步提升愛心產量吧！

朝著極致可愛♥的目標，快來點擊吧！

【狂熱模式】

普通狂熱：心形生產力與點擊生產力獲得強力加成！

超狂熱：獲得超強大的生產力加成！

點擊狂熱：連點滑鼠即可獲得生產力加成！

加特林狂熱：每連點6次即可獲得道具生產力加成！

旋轉狂熱：轉動魔法陣吧！每次旋轉都能獲得大量愛心！

轉盤狂熱：轉出三個相同數字即可獲得大量愛心！

怪物狂熱：與夥伴們一起擊敗怪物吧！連點滑鼠發動攻擊！

【迷你遊戲】

農場：消耗心臟培育作物，待其成長後收穫吧！作物在生長過程中會強化生產力！

賓果：抽取數字完成賓果排列！大量獲取心臟的絕佳機會！

轉生：強勢展開新遊戲！強化生產力，更高效地點擊吧！

【特色亮點】

融合傳統點擊遊戲風格與可愛角色動畫

購買升級項目可大幅提升心形產量

「狂熱模式」開啟心形狂撈機會！

更可觸發額外心形獎勵的「超狂熱模式」！

data.short_description: 終極可愛♥點擊遊戲，以更萌姿態強勢回歸!! 累積能量條進入「狂熱模式」，盡情收集滿滿愛心吧！ 為了欣賞可愛角色們的萌動動畫…快來點擊吧♪
data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows7(SP1+),Windows10,Windows11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Kawaii Clicker Reborn
data.detailed_description:
【Ultimate cute clicker game is back and even cuter than ever!】

“Kawaii Clicker Reborn” is a clicker game where you produce hearts alongside cute characters.

Click the screen to fill the gauge and enter “Fever Mode” to get a production power bonus and collect tons of hearts!

Use the hearts you've collected to purchase mysterious items and produce even more hearts!

Click away to watch the cute animations of the adorable characters!

Fill the world with the ultimate cuteness!

【Fever Mode】

Normal Fever: Strong bonus to heart production power and click production power!

Ultra Fever: Super strong production power bonus!

Click Fever: Bonus to productivity with consecutive clicks!

Gatling Fever: Bonus to item production power for every 6 clicks!

Spin Fever: Spin the magic circle! Earn a large number of hearts for every spin!

Slot Fever: Earn a large number of hearts by matching three numbers in the slot!

Monster Fever: Defeat monsters with your friends! Click to attack!

【Mini-games】

Farm: Spend hearts to grow crops and harvest them. Crops will strengthen your productivity while growing!

Bingo: Draw numbers to get bingo numbers! Chance to get a lot of hearts!

Reincarnation: A strong new game! Strengthen your production power and click more efficiently!

【Appeal Points】

Mixes traditional clicker game style with cute character animation

Purchasing upgrades dramatically increases heart production

“Fever Mode” gives you a chance to get a lot of hearts!

Draw the “Ultra Fever Mode” to get even more hearts!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows7(SP1+),Windows10,Windows11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
